giveaway_details.prize: Box of baseball cards + $50 Amazon gift card
giveaway_details.how_to_enter: Follow @UpperDecky15 on X and DM us: LLHR
giveaway_details.rules: One winner per inside-the-park HR. Must follow + DM before the next LLHR to be eligible.

events.description: Gets a favorable bounce and turns on the jets for Boston's first inside-the-parker since 2018
Drive just evades Denzel Clarke in center field, giving the Rays speedster a chance to motor around the bases
Perfectly placed off the facade in right center, leading to a wild race around the bases to walk it off
Hit one into the alley, sped around the bases and collected his first career inside-the-parker
Broke the tie in extras and recorded the Nationals' fastest home-to-home time in the Statcast Era
Already had 2 little league homers in 2025 so of course he had to add another to his resume
